examples: Also, the species and population of pollinating insects were found to be the most optimal in the fields of mixed alfalfa and sainfoin.
The low rate of sowing, wide space between rows, proper amount of nitrogen and phosphorous and a timely irrigation also had good effect on seed production of sainfoin.
Swedes, manigolds, fodder roots, hay, lucerne(alfalfa), clover, sainfoin, forage kale, lupines, vetches and similar forage products, whether or not in the form of pellets.
